value.heading: Donate
value.subheading: Placeholder — your gift keeps neighbors fed.

value.body: Our donation form runs on **Zeffy**, which is free for us to use — so every cent of your gift reaches Soup House. At checkout Zeffy will offer to add a **tip for Zeffy** on top of your donation. That tip is optional and doesn't come to us. If you'd rather not, just choose **"Other"** and enter **$0**.
